mnemonics.title: SCALE Memory Aid
mnemonics.content:
S - Size appropriately (Right-sizing)
C - Cost optimization strategies
A - Auto scaling policies
L - Load balancing configuration
E - Elasticity requirements

acronyms.usage: Logical grouping of EC2 instances that share scaling policies and configuration
Layer 7 load balancer that routes traffic based on application content
Standardized measure of computing resource consumption
Distributes load across multiple servers for high availability
Isolated cloud environment for deploying resources

visualTips.visualization: Think of vertical scaling like adding floors to a single building, horizontal scaling like building multiple smaller buildings side by side
Loop diagram: Monitor Metrics → Compare Threshold → Trigger Policy → Scale Resources → Wait for Stabilization → Repeat
Three points: Performance, Cost, Availability - optimizing one may require compromising another

analogies.analogy: Like a restaurant that automatically opens more tables and hires more staff during dinner rush and closes them after peak hours
Like a hotel receptionist distributing guests across available rooms to prevent overcrowding
Like wearing shoes that fit - too big wastes material, too small causes discomfort
